Most homeowners don’t think about the warranty until the paint starts peeling.

By then, the crew is long gone.

The number doesn’t work.

And the “guarantee” turns out to be just a promise — not a plan.

Angel built United Painting to change that.

After 10+ years in the industry — from painting tiny homes to managing full remodels — he saw what made homeowners lose trust:
Projects that started late and ended messy.

Crews that didn’t communicate

Paint jobs that looked good for 6 months then started to fade or chip away.

That’s why every job at United is backed by a 10-Year Iron-Clad Guaran
top_ads.headline: One Family. One Mission. One Standard: Quality.

top_ads.primary_text:
I'm Dave. I paint houses. I also need to eat occasionally.
Groundbreaking stuff, I know.

Look, I could tell you that Proper Painters is "a cut above the rest" or that we "exceed expectations," but you've heard that from every painter who bought a Facebook ad this week. 

So let me try something radical: honesty mixed with moderate charm.

Here's what we actually do:

✅ Interior & exterior painting (the classics)
✅ Deck and fence staining (because wood gets sad without it)
✅ Carpentry, board replacement, drywall repairs (we fix things before painting over the evidence)
✅ Free color consultatio

top_ads.primary_text:
Five Red Flags When Hiring A Painter (And Why They Matter).
Most homeowners don't know what to look for when hiring a painter. So they end up with a job that looks great for a year, then falls apart.

I'm Ben, owner of Foothills Painting, and I started this company in 2010 because I kept seeing the same bad practices that hurt homeowners. 

Here's what to watch for:

🚩 Warranty under 5 years? That's usually a bad sign. It means they don't trust their own work.
